pack_intro: Fitness, sleep, diet — private data you control.
privacy_note: Health data only exports to platforms you explicitly allow. Never shared by default.

questions.question: Your relationship with exercise is...
questions.why_this_matters: Tells AI your fitness context — from beginner to experienced.

options.label: Regular routine — I know what I'm doing
options.export_rule: I exercise regularly and know what I'm doing. Skip beginner advice — give me advanced tips.

options.label: On-off — I go through phases
options.export_rule: My fitness is inconsistent. Help me maintain momentum. Don't judge gaps.

options.label: Want to start but struggling to stick with it
options.export_rule: I'm building a fitness habit. Start simple, build gradually. Celebrate small wins.

options.label: Not a priority right now
options.export_rule: Fitness is not my focus right now. Don't push exercise advice unless I ask.

questions.question: It's 11 PM, alarm set for 7 AM. Realistically you...

options.label: Asleep by 11:30 — I protect my sleep
options.export_rule: I maintain good sleep hygiene. Factor in my sleep schedule when suggesting timelines.

options.label: Phone scrolling until 1 AM, hate myself tomorrow
options.export_rule: I struggle with late-night screen time. If suggesting evening tasks, remind me to wrap up before 11 PM.

options.label: Depends — some nights disciplined, some not
options.export_rule: My sleep varies. Don't assume I'm well-rested or exhausted — ask if relevant.

options.label: My schedule is completely irregular
options.export_rule: My sleep schedule is irregular. Don't assume any standard wake/sleep times.

questions.question: Any allergies, conditions, or restrictions AI should know about?
questions.why_this_matters: Safety — ensures AI never suggests something harmful to you.
questions.placeholder: e.g. nut allergy, lactose intolerant, asthma (or skip)
